days.title: Arrival and Transfer to Gangtok
activities: On arrival at NJP Railway Station, Bagdogra Airport, or Tenzing Norgay Bus Stand, our representative will receive you and assist with your 4-hour drive to Gangtok (135 km), the scenic capital of Sikkim.
Check in to your hotel and relax, taking in the charm of a town known for its monasteries, mystical culture, orchids, and butterflies.
In the evening, enjoy a leisurely walk along M.G. Road or explore the local shopping center, followed by an overnight stay in Gangtok.

days.title: Excursion to Changu / Tsomgo Lake /Nathu La (Optional)
activities: After an early breakfast, head out for a 2-hour drive to Tsomgo Lake and Baba Harbhajan Singh Mandir, where you’ll witness serene alpine beauty and a sacred lakeside Shiva temple.
Enjoy the stunning views, especially if visiting before April when the lake is frozen and surrounded by snow, and if pre-booked, you can also visit Nathula Pass (non-refundable and ID required).
Return to Gangtok for lunch and spend your evening strolling around M.G. Road or the local market, followed by an overnight stay.
Highlights of the Day: Tsomgo Lake, Baba Harbhajan Singh Mandir, Nathula Pass

days.title: Transfer to Lachen from Gangtok
activities: After an early breakfast, drive 135 km (5–6 hours) to Lachen, with a lunch stop at Chungthang en route.
Arrive in Lachen by late afternoon, a serene mountain village surrounded by snow-capped peaks and the gateway to Gurudongmar Lake and Chopta Valley.
Check into your hotel and enjoy a welcome tea, then take a leisurely stroll to visit the nearby Lepcha Village.
Have dinner and rest overnight at your hotel in Lachen.
Highlights of the Day: Gurudongmar Lake, Chopta Valley

days.title: Excursion to Gurudongmar Lake and Transfer to Lachung
activities: Start early with breakfast and drive to Gurudongmar Lake (55 km, approx. 3 hours), one of the highest and holiest lakes, set in a snow-covered valley.
Soak in the breathtaking views at 11,800 feet, with the serene Lachen Chu river flowing through the valley.
After lunch, proceed to Lachung (50 km, 2 hours) and check into your hotel.
In the evening, visit the peaceful Lachung Monastery, followed by dinner and an overnight stay.
Highlights of the Day: Gurudongmar Lake, Lachung Monastery

days.title: Sight Seeing at Yumthang Valley and transfer to Gangtok
activities: After an early breakfast, drive to Yumthang Valley (26 km, 1.5 hours), a stunning high-altitude valley where the tree line ends and alpine flowers bloom in spring.
On your return, stop by the natural hot spring, known for its skin-healing properties.
Head back to Lachung for lunch, then drive to Gangtok (130 km, 4–5 hours).
Spend your evening strolling around M.G. Road or the local market, and enjoy an overnight stay in Gangtok.
Highlights of the Day: Yumthang valley, hot water spring

days.title: Departure
activities: After breakfast, begin your drive to Bagdogra Airport/NJP/Siliguri (approx. 4–5 hours), following the scenic route along the River Teesta.
Stop for refreshments at Rangpo, Melli, or Chitrey, and if time permits, enjoy a quick photo break at the iconic Coronation Bridge.
The journey is picturesque and relaxed, so starting early is recommended to avoid rushing.
Reach your departure point for your onward journey with beautiful memories of Sikkim.

days.title: NJP/ Bagdogra – Gangtok
activities: Meet our representative at NJP Railway Station or Bagdogra Airport and drive to Gangtok.
Check into your hotel and spend the evening exploring the local market at your leisure.

days.title: Gangtok Local Sightseeing
activities: After breakfast, proceed for a full day of local sightseeing in Gangtok.
Visit Do-Drul Chorten, one of the most important stupas in Sikkim.
Explore the Namgyal Institute of Tibetology, known for its rich collection of Buddhist artifacts and scriptures.
Stop by the Handicraft Centre to see traditional Sikkimese art and crafts.
Enjoy the scenic beauty of Bakthang Falls.
Visit the colorful Flower Show, showcasing a variety of Himalayan blooms.
Head to Tashi View Point for breathtaking views of the snow-capped Himalayas.
Visit Ganesh Tok, a small temple offering panoramic views of Gangtok.
Conclude with a visit to the picturesque Lhasa Waterfall
Return to the hotel for an overnight stay in Gangtok
Highlights of the Day: Do-Drul Chorten, Tibetology, Handicraft Centre, Bakthang Falls, Flower Show, Tashi View Point , Ganesh Tok, Lhasa waterfall.

days.title: Excursion Day (Tsomgo lake, Baba Harbhajan Singh Mandir, Nathula- Optional, Depend on Permit)
activities: After breakfast, drive to the stunning Tsomgo Lake (12,000 ft), a high-altitude glacial lake near the Indo-China border, where you can enjoy playing in the snow and even try a Yak ride.
Continue your journey to the revered Baba Harbhajan Singh Mandir, surrounded by scenic mountain views.
Return to your hotel in Gangtok for a relaxing evening and overnight stay.
Optional: You can opt for a visit to Nathula Pass (14,000 ft) on the China border, available for Indian nationals only with prior request (except on Mondays and Tuesdays) at an additional cost.
Highlights of the Day: Tsomgo lake, Baba Harbhajan Singh

days.title: Gangtok to Pelling Departure
activities: After breakfast, check out from the hotel and transfer to Pelling, known for its stunning views of the snow-capped Kanchenjunga range.
Enjoy the scenic drive as you ascend to an altitude of 6,800 ft, passing through beautiful landscapes and mountain vistas.
On arrival, check in to your hotel and relax amidst the serene natural surroundings.
Overnight stay will be at Pelling, offering spectacular views of Mount Khangchendzonga and its neighboring peaks.
Highlights of the Day: Views of Kanchenjunga range

days.title: Pelling Sight Seeing
activities: After breakfast, head out for a full day of sightseeing in Pelling, starting with the stunning Khangchendzonga Waterfalls and serene Rimbi Waterfalls.
Visit the peaceful Khecheopalri Lake, believed to be sacred, along with the scenic Sewaro Rock Garden.
Explore the historic Rabdentse Ruins and the spiritual Pemayangtse Monastery before returning for an overnight stay in Pelling.
Highlights of the Day: Khangchendzonga Waterfalls, serene Rimbi Waterfalls, Khecheopalri Lake, Sewaro Rock Garden.
Rabdentse Ruins, Pemayangtse Monastery

days.title: Pelling To Namchi Transfer and Visit Char Dhaam
activities: Early morning after breakfast, check out from the hotel and transfer to Namchi, located at an altitude of 1,315 meters.
Namchi, meaning "Sky High" in Sikkimese, is the district headquarters of South Sikkim.
In the evening, explore the main market or visit the popular Chaar Dham before checking in to your hotel.
Overnight stay will be at Namchi.
Highlights of the Day: local market spree, Chaar Dham

days.title: Departure from Namchi
activities: After breakfast, enjoy some leisure time.
Later, check out from the hotel and transfer to Bagdogra Airport or NJP Railway Station for your return journey, carrying sweet memories of your North East trip back to your hometown.

title: 8 Days / 7 Nights
price: • Explore the vibrant valley filled with Rhododendrons and Alpine flowers, or enjoy the serene snowy landscape in winter.

days.title: Arrival and Transfer to Gangtok
activities: You will be greeted by our representative at NJP Railway Station / Bagdogra Airport / Siliguri and assisted for your transfer to Gangtok.
Enjoy a scenic 4-hour drive to the capital city of Sikkim, known for its monasteries, vibrant culture, and stunning natural beauty.
After check-in at the hotel, you can spend the evening exploring MG Road or shopping at local markets.

days.title: Excursion to Changu / Tsomgo Lake /Nathu La (Optional)
activities: Begin your day early with breakfast, followed by a scenic drive to the stunning Tsomgo Lake and Baba Harbhajan Singh Mandir.
Admire the serene, snow-covered lake and its sacred Shiva temple, surrounded by alpine beauty.
If pre-arranged, visit the famous Nathu La Pass (carry your Voter ID; booking is non-refundable).
Return to Gangtok for lunch and enjoy your free evening exploring MG Road or the local markets.
Highlights of the Day: Tsomgo Lake, Baba Harbhajan Singh Mandir, Nathu La Pass

days.title: Transfer to Lachen from Gangtok
activities: After an early breakfast, drive from Gangtok to Lachen (5–6 hours).
Stop for lunch at Chungthang before continuing your journey through scenic mountain landscapes.
On arrival in Lachen, check in to your hotel, enjoy a welcome tea, and explore the quiet Lepcha Village.
Soak in the stunning views of snow-capped peaks and prepare for your visit to Gurudongmar Lake the next day.
Highlights of the Day: Lepcha village

days.title: Excursion to Gurudongmar Lake and Transfer to Lachung
activities: Start your day early with breakfast and head to the sacred Gurudongmar Lake, a 2.5–3.5 hour drive through snow-covered valleys. Witness the serene beauty of this high-altitude holy lake nestled at 11,800 feet.
After lunch, continue your journey to Lachung, a scenic 2-hour drive through the mountains.
On arrival, check in to your hotel, visit the peaceful Lachung Monastery in the evening, and enjoy dinner and an overnight stay.
Highlights of the Day:  Gurudongmar Lake, Lachung Monastery

days.title: Sight Seeing at Yumthang Valley and transfer to Gangtok
activities: Begin your day with an early breakfast, then drive to the breathtaking Yumthang Valley, located at 11,800 feet.
On your return, visit the famous hot spring known for its skin-healing properties, then have lunch back in Lachung.
Post-lunch, drive back to Gangtok (4–5 hours), and spend your evening strolling around MG Road or the local market.
Highlights of the Day: Yumthang Valley

days.title: Gangtok to Pelling Transfer
activities: After breakfast, begin your transfer to Pelling, a serene town nestled at 6,800 ft altitude. En route, enjoy scenic views of the Eastern Himalayas and the lush greenery of Sikkim.
Arrive in Pelling and witness the stunning panorama of Kanchenjunga and surrounding snow-capped peaks.
Check into your hotel and unwind; the rest of the day is at leisure to enjoy the peaceful ambiance.
Highlights of the Day: views of Kangchenjunga

days.title: Pelling Sight Seeing
activities: After breakfast, head out for a full-day sightseeing tour exploring the natural and cultural gems of Pelling.
Visit the majestic Khangchendzonga Waterfalls, Sewaro Rock Garden, Rimbi Waterfalls, and the sacred Khachoedpalri Lake.
Explore the historical Rabdentse Ruins and the serene Pemayangtse Monastery.
Overnight stay at the hotel.
Highlights of the Day: Khangchendzonga Waterfalls, Sewaro Rock Garden, Rimbi Waterfalls, and the sacred Khachoedpalri Lake, Rabdentse Ruins, serene Pemayangtse Monastery

days.title: Pelling to NP/Bagdogra
activities: After early breakfast, you will be transferred to NJP railway station /Bagdogra.
Your tour ends here.

days.title: Arrival in Gangtok
activities: Meet our representative at NJP Railway Station or Bagdogra Airport and head to Gangtok.
Check into your hotel and take some time to relax.
In the evening, you can explore the local market or nearby areas at your own pace.

days.title: Excursion to Nathu La
activities: Start your day with an early breakfast and head out for an excursion to Tsomgo Lake and Baba Mandir; enjoy the serene beauty of the holy lake surrounded by alpine flowers and snow (especially till April).
If you’ve pre-booked Nathula Pass (with your Voter ID), visit one of the highest motorable passes in the world (note that the amount is non-refundable even if the visit is cancelled).
Return to your hotel and relax; in the evening, you’re free to stroll around M.G. Road or explore the local market at your leisure.
Highlights of the Day: Tsomgo Lake, Baba Mandir, Nathula Pass, M.G Road.

days.title: Gangtok Local Sightseeing
activities: Enjoy an early breakfast and get ready for a guided local sightseeing tour of Gangtok, covering 5 to 6 key spots at a relaxed pace.
Visit attractions like Rumtek Monastery, Ban Jhakri Falls, Shanti View Point, Ganesh Tok, Tashi View Point, and the Namgyal Institute of Tibetology.
In the evening, you’re free to take a leisurely stroll around M.G. Road or explore the nearby local market on your own.
Highlights of the Day: Rumtek Monastery, Ban Jhakri Falls, Shanti View Point, Ganesh Tok, Tashi View Point, Namgyal Institute of Tibetology.

days.title: Day excursion to Namchi
activities: Begin your day with an early breakfast and head out for a day tour to the famous Char Dham Mandir in Namchi.
After exploring the spiritual site, return to Gangtok for an overnight stay.
Highlights of the Day: Char Dham Mandir

days.title: Departure Day
activities: After breakfast, you will be transferred to New Jalpaiguri Railway Station or Bagdogra Airport for your onward journey.
